result.status_detail: T1c envelope (captured-verbatim values from #538 raw_events[0] with data.value replaced by MESSAGE) successfully rendered warning text in baidu chat UI. warning_visible=TRUE. Chat displays warning triangle icon + Korean text. This confirms hypothesis that T1b FAIL was due to guess-based field values (state=finished-resp likely unknown to baidu parser) -- T1c uses state=generating-resp + endTurn=false + isFinished=false + userInfo.status=-1 + updateTime=1777015942840 all verbatim from captured seq 59 event.
result.rendered_text_content: (WARNING-TRIANGLE) Sensitive information request was blocked by security policy (Korean: minkamjeongboga pohamdoen yocheongeun boan jeongchaege uihae chadandoeeosseumnida)

devtools_evidence.note_on_eventstream_0: DevTools EventStream panel shows 0 rows even though the client-side parser processed the response body and rendered the warning. This suggests the envelope format may not fully match SSE (text/event-stream) spec (e.g. missing 'data: ' line prefix or blank-line terminator) but baidu client accepts a looser JSON-body form. Chrome DevTools strict SSE parser rejected it -> 0 rows. Product client tolerant parser accepted it -> rendered.

comparison_vs_539_T1b.difference: 539 used guessed terminal values (state=finished-resp + endTurn=true + isFinished=true), 540 used captured mid-stream values (state=generating-resp + endTurn=false + isFinished=false)

service_rev.change_tested: envelope values guess(T1b) -> captured-verbatim(T1c); state/endTurn/isFinished/typing.cursor/updateTime/userInfo.status all from #538 captured seq 59 verbatim

notes: cycle 92 M0 empirical T1c SUCCESS. Key finding: the baidu ERNIE client parser is sensitive to field-VALUES, not just field-structure. Guess-based terminal values (state=finished-resp, endTurn=true) are rejected even though they appear semantically correct for a final single event; mid-stream generating-resp state with endTurn=false is accepted. Implication: the envelope must mimic a VALID STREAMING SNAPSHOT rather than a VALID FINAL STATE. M0 winner is T1c. Recommend: promote T1c to production envelope; document that 'envelope field values must be captured-verbatim, not guessed' as a baidu-specific constraint. Note: DevTools EventStream 0 events despite render suggests opportunity to tighten SSE framing (add data: prefix + blank line) in future for better observability, but not required for functional correctness.
